intro: Larochea coccinea, also known as red Larochea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, wounds, and infections. Larochea coccinea contains bioactive constituents such as alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Larochea coccinea is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or powder, and is used to treat a range of conditions, including coughs, colds, and skin conditions.
